name: Chicken W/Mild Red Chili Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tablespoons fresh oregano leaves (or 1 1/2 teaspoons dried)
8 large chicken breasts halves, boneless with skin
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first nine ingredients in a blender or food processor and blend until smooth.
2. Pound the chicken breasts between sheets of plastic wrap to about half an inch thickness using a meat mallet.
3. Place the chicken in a 13-inch by 9-inch by 2-inch glass baking dish.
4. Pour the marinade over the chicken and turn to coat.
5. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
6. Prepare the barbecue for medium-high heat or preheat the broiler.
7. Drain the marinade into a small saucepan and boil for 5 minutes.
8. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
9. Grill or broil the chicken until cooked through, about 5 minutes per side.
10. Brush some marinade over the chicken.
11. Transfer to a platter.
12. Garnish with oregano sprigs.
13. Serve with remaining marinade.
